exercises.title: TLS Handshake Size Calculator
exercises.description: Build a detailed TLS handshake size calculator for different algorithm combinations.
tasks: Calculate sizes for classical, hybrid, and PQC-only
hints: Include ClientHello, ServerHello, Certificate, CertificateVerify, Finished
Certificate size depends on chain length

exercises.title: TLS Configuration Generator
exercises.description: Create a tool that generates TLS configuration for PQC deployment.
tasks: Support multiple TLS libraries (OpenSSL, BoringSSL format)
exercises.expectedOutput: Configuration generator for multiple TLS stacks
hints: Include both primary and fallback certificates

exercises.title: Handshake Latency Estimator
exercises.description: Estimate TLS handshake latency for different configurations and network conditions.
tasks: Account for message sizes and bandwidth
hints: Full handshake is 1-RTT for key exchange + 1 for data
Larger messages may need more TCP packets

exercises.title: TLS Capability Tester
exercises.description: Design a test plan to verify TLS PQC capabilities of servers.
tasks: List tests for key exchange support
List tests for signature algorithm support
